docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY ABUHAMDIEH, AIMAN AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABUHAMDIEH, AIMAN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-15-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SCOTT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABUHAMDIEH, AIMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, SCOTT $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $440.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SCOTT HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SCOTT SMITH
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-24-2012 AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, SCOTT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2012 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-31-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL: BENCH LETTER MAILED TO AIMAN ABUHAMDIEH RETURNED.

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2012; JUDGMENT DEBTOR SCOTT SMITH FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(JC). NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT(JD). JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE UPDATE TO PLAINTIFF(S) ADDRESS; FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABUHAMDIEH, AIMAN
